title: visually perfected
description:
optimization+visual
(contains many data packs, client side)
body:
- # ✨ visually perfected
## The Ultimate Vanilla+ Client Experience

- [visually perfected] is a lightweight client-side modpack focused on making Minecraft look better, feel smoother, and play more comfortably—without sacrificing performance.

- Built around carefully selected visual enhancements, ReShade support, and essential quality-of-life improvements, this pack delivers a modern Minecraft experience while staying compatible with vanilla and modded servers.

## 🎨 Enhanced Visuals

- Experience Minecraft with improved visuals that stay faithful to the game's original style.

- ReShade integration for better lighting, colors, and atmosphere
- Improved visual effects and immersion
- Enhanced UI and in-game readability
- Vanilla-friendly aesthetic with a modern touch
## ⚡ Performance First

> Unlike many visual-focused packs, performance remains a priority.

- Optimized client-side mods
- Reduced stuttering and smoother gameplay
- Fast loading
- Designed to maintain high FPS even with visual enhancements enabled
## 🛠️ Quality of Life Improvements
- Better inventory management
- Improved menus and interfaces
- Useful gameplay utilities
- Enhanced accessibility features
- Small tweaks that make a big difference

## 📦 Features
- Beautiful visuals with ReShade support
- HMI 5.1
- FPS-friendly optimization
- Comprehensive QoL improvements
- Modern user interface
- Vanilla+ experience
## 🚀 Who Is This Pack For?
> Shader experience without FPS flaws, smoother Minecraft experience.

Install, launch, and enjoy Minecraft the way it should feel.
